title: Import holidays to account schedule
excerpt: Would love the ability to import holidays to the account schedule so we don’t have to click through each month to set the holidays.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love the ability to import holidays to the account schedule so we don’t have to click through each month to set the holidays.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. Yesterday we launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. If this is still relevant for you, here it is-

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
